name: Squaretrail: Lines of The Frame
short_description: Squaretrail: Lines of The Frame is a puzzle and adventure game where you progress by rotating square-shaped worlds. Your main character is a cube and you have to overcome different challenges in each level.
detailed_description:
Squaretrail: Lines of The Frame is a puzzle and adventure game where you progress by rotating square-shaped worlds. Your main character is a cube and you have to overcome different challenges in each level. You can control your cube with the 'WASD' keys and rotate the world with 'E' and 'Q'. As you complete the chapters, you can unlock new worlds. Squaretrail: Lines of The Frame offers a fun and immersive gaming experience that requires both intelligence and skill.


In-Game Features
  • Rotating the World

  • Teleporting Platforms

  • Challenging Maps
